criteria_verification.criterion_text: `test_get_transcript_real_video` verifies full transcript fetch for known public video (dQw4w9WgXcQ)
criteria_verification.evidence: test_get_transcript_real_video makes a real network call to fetch transcript for dQw4w9WgXcQ with --no-segments. Asserts exit code 0, video_id matches, full_text has >100 chars, and all expected fields (language, language_code, is_auto_generated, total_segments, total_duration_seconds) are present with correct types. Test passes in 4s.
criteria_verification.notes: test_get_transcript_real_video makes a real network call to fetch transcript for dQw4w9WgXcQ with --no-segments. Asserts exit code 0, video_id matches, full_text has >100 chars, and all expected fields (language, language_code, is_auto_generated, total_segments, total_duration_seconds) are present with correct types. Test passes in 4s.

criteria_verification.evidence: test_video_info_real_video exists and tests video-info command for dQw4w9WgXcQ. It is conditionally skipped with @pytest.mark.skipif when YouTubeClient is not available (FEAT-SKEL-002 dependency not yet implemented). When YouTubeClient is available, it will assert exit code 0 and validate video_id, title, channel, duration_seconds, and has_captions fields. The test exists and is correctly structured per the AC.
criteria_verification.notes: test_video_info_real_video exists and tests video-info command for dQw4w9WgXcQ. It is conditionally skipped with @pytest.mark.skipif when YouTubeClient is not available (FEAT-SKEL-002 dependency not yet implemented). criteria_verification.criterion_text: All results are valid JSON with expected fields
criteria_verification.evidence: All test methods call json.loads(captured.out) to parse stdout as JSON. test_get_transcript_output_is_pure_json explicitly verifies stdout starts with '{', ends with '}', and parses as valid JSON. Field assertions check video_id, full_text, language, segments structure, error.code, error.message across all tests.
criteria_verification.notes: All test methods call json.loads(captured.out) to parse stdout as JSON. test_get_transcript_output_is_pure_json explicitly verifies stdout starts with '{', ends with '}', and parses as valid JSON. Field assertions check video_id, full_text, language, segments structure, error.code, error.message across all tests.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Exit codes are correct (0 for success)
criteria_verification.evidence: test_get_transcript_real_video and test_get_transcript_real_video_with_segments assert exit_code == 0 for successful operations. test_get_transcript_invalid_video_returns_error asserts exit_code == 1 for error cases. test_video_info_real_video also asserts exit_code == 0 when enabled.
